Respondent'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To File Records Under Seal
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Petitioner MAKSIMS ANDRUHOVICS (Tel: 650-531-36663) in pro per;
Atty. KATHERINE B. BEARMAN, Esq. of Office of the City Attorney (Tel: 415-554-4256) for respondent City and County of San Francisco (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To File Records Under Seal.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Respondent's unopposed motion to seal is granted. There is good cause to seal the adduced documents. Respondent shall prepare a proposed order that cites the findings of CRC 2.550(d) and expressly cites the information to be sealed.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition For Relief From Claim Requirement
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Petitioner MAKSIMS ANDRUHOVICS (Tel: 650-531-36663) in pro per;
Atty. KATHERINE B. BEARMAN, Esq. of Office of the City Attorney (Tel: 415-554-4256) for respondent City and County of San Francisco (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: PETITIONER MAKSIMS ANDRUHOVICS' Petition For Relief From Claim Requirement.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The proceedings on Maksims Andruhovics' "petition for relief from claim requirement" are stayed pending resolution of case number 22-CV-01178-DMR in the United States District Court for the Northern District of California.

Andruhovics filed case number GCG-21-597285 in our court, which defendant City and County of San Francisco removed to federal court in February 2022. The City reports that the claim requirement is being adjudicated in federal court. Having two courts address the same claim requirement would be inefficient and could result in conflicting rulings. Thus, this court exercises its inherent powers to stay Andruhovics' petition. (OTO, LLC v. Kho (2019) 8 Cal.5th 111, 141.)

Counsel for respondent to prepare and submit a proposed order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
